case_title: CTI II, LLC VS. MARTIN SOLORZANO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER CTI II, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER CTI II, LLC

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER CTI II, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PETITION WAS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE ON APRIL 26, 2013. JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER CTI II, LLC
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CTI II, LLC HEARING SET FOR APR-25-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-25-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER CTI II, LLC'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY 22, 2013 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN APRIL 25, 2013. AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-22-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
